title: potentilla × collina subsp. tomentosa
intro: Potentilla × collina subsp. tomentosa, also known as woolly cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Rosaceae, which is a hybrid of Potentilla collina and Potentilla tomentosa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Potentilla × collina subsp. tomentosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
